mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate above 5% signals tighter monetary policy, which raises discount rates and compresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% indicates a tightening labor market, which may signal inflationary pressures and preemptive monetary policy tightening, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent decline in industrial production and housing starts suggests weakening demand, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the combined INDPRO-HOUST signal falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the money supply (RSAFS) combined with rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) indicates monetary instability, which increases equity risk premiums and causes negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 2% and CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 3 months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of instances where RSAFS declines and CPIAUCSL rises.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above its 3-month moving average signals strengthening supply-side capacity, which lowers inflation expectations and supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO exceeds its 3-month MA.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 150k in a month suggests labor market overheating, which may prompt aggressive monetary policy tightening and result in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in real sales (RSAFS) combined with weak GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates deteriorating demand conditions, which lowers corporate profitability and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the combined RSAFS-GDPC1 signal falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate below 4.5% during a period of rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals accommodative policy in the face of price pressures, which may lead to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days due to inflation uncertainty.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where FEDFUNDS < 4.5% and CPIAUCSL > 2.5%.
